div1.entryFree:
Ground, vb. 1) to fix firmly, to settle: it (selflove) is so --ed inward in my heart, Sonn. 62, 4. no --ed malice, R3 I, 3, 29.
2) to found, to base, to set as on a foundation or cause: hate of my sin, --ed on sinful loving, Sonn. 142, 2. displeasure --ed upon no other argument, As I, 2, 291. how --ed he his title to the crown? H8 I, 2, 144.
